item.title: The Top Five Celebrities at Our Dream Party Barge
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
The Top Five Celebrities at Our Dream Party Barge

The Best Guest List for a Premier Party Disco Cruise in Austin, Texas

There comes a time in every person’s life when they must ask themselves serious questions in order to navigate the modern world we live in. This is a normal part of a human’s intellectual development process and should not be taken lightly. We believe that as a party boat company operating out of Lake Travis in Austin, Texas, where we rent out private pontoon boats but also specialize in our FAMOUS DISCO CRUISE PARTY events for bachelor and bachelorette parties that it makes perfect sense we should play a role in assisting with teasing out the answers to life’s greatest mysteries for you.
I mean, who else should you look to, philosophers or spiritual guides?! Obviously it’s us you need and we are so here for you.

We can and will address many things for you through this blog, whether you want us to or not, and today we would like to tackle something that, surely, we all ponder over. The question comes to us while we wash the dishes, go on a walk- you know, the times when your mind meanders on it’s own and asks you…

WHICH TOP FIVE CELEBRITIES WOULD YOU MOST WANT TO PARTY WITH ON A DISCO CRUISE?!

We’ve thought about it so you don’t have to and can you believe someone actually gets paid to write this, here we go!

BRITNEY SPEARS.

I mean…here is the thing. She loves to dance so she is, without a doubt, going to get that party boat dance floor BOPPING while our DJs are doing what they do best and cultivating vibes, as they do. She is unpredictable and frequently nude-but peaceful (unless we also invited her family on board which, we would NEVER so not a problem). This makes her our number 1 dream boat party attendee due to sheer entertainment factors combined with a small level of fear from the innate knowledge that behind those empty black doll eyes there is a wild woman who could either corner you and vent about how rude her heartless children or try to tongue kiss you and that mixture is what keeps adrenaline pumping, causing you to feel alive.

BILL MURRAY.

Need we explain further? He’s the ultimate party starter, facilitator, and until the last minute he is on point until we dock back at Anderson Mill Marina and the party is over. He gets along with everyone, he is calm, he is funny, he loves life and we believe he would also follow the boat rules, especially now that he is older. We aren’t sure if we could handle young Bill Murray, he may have had to sign a special kind of waiver to protect us from that kind of liability. Bill Murray is a DREAM Disco Cruiser.

MARTHA STEWART.

Ok hear us out. You look at her and you think, “what’s up” older conservative lady? But then, it’s Martha Stewart and it is an older conservative lady but she’s high, has prison stories and is right there in the mix with you making jokes, chatting, a with and entire tray of GOURMET SANDWICHES dressed with cute little wrappers. We mean, like, the kind of sandwiches that have artisanal homemade bread and fancy things like grey poupon or whatever. All kinds of sandwiches. A variety. Just like Bill Murray, she’s not here to cause the kind of trouble which leads to injury, she’s maternal and wants you to survive and listen to us but, again, she is high and has sandwiches along with some possible sage wisdom to disperse to tipsy Disco attendees and we believe this combination would make her a fantastic addition.

LIZZO.

We don’t believe we need to justify this choice but we will go ahead and paint the picture for you anyway because of course we will. A beautiful, body positive, fun, funny, confident black woman who can dance and sing and encourage women to let loose and be comfortable, to be themselves?! Also the DJ could play Lizzo songs and she could dance with you to her own songs, which would be epic and we would like to see that because Lizzo songs are always good, no matter how much we hear them. And we hear them a lot. We love this choice. We would make this choice over and over again.

MILEY CYRUS.

We just want to see what would happen. 

We hope this post helps to answer at least one of the deep existential queries you may have rolling around in your heart and solidifies that you should listen to everything we say because we know what we are talking about.

item.title: Joint Bachelor/Bachelorette Parties With Premier Party Cruises
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
Joint Bachelor/Bachelorette Parties With Premier Party Cruises

Ode to A Combined Bachelor/ Bachelorette Parties in Austin, Texas

Ahhhh, marriage. Engagement. Love, we hope! The concept of formally connecting oneself to one another in front of God/community/the internet for life is not new but is constantly being redefined as society itself evolves. Being that the idea of betrothal can be so different from couple to couple it feels important to delve inward before deciding how a union should be celebrated, a one size fits all mentality simply won’t do. Over at Premier Party Cruises, we know this. We seent it! In fact, through our years of what some might call “heroic” work in running our famous party barges out of Lake Travis in Austin, Texas we have become something of a celebration expert. People come out to our Bachelor/Bachelorette party Disco Cruises from all over the world and every walk of life. Humans in different colors, shapes, sexual orientations and varying aptitudes for busting sick dance moves on our deck arrive to Anderson Mill Marina and walk down the dock to our blue pontoon boats to celebrate with us under the disco balls. We really feel that the differences between everyone we meet just make what we do more exciting and as long as you are a good human we are so excited to celebrate you for the day, no matter what.

Today, we want to give special attention to a subset of engaged people that we know exist because we have met them with increasing frequency in our line of work out on the lake, but who mostly live in society’s minds as the stuff of legend and mythical folklore. We dare to imagine but do these people really exist or are they simply fodder for our vivid imaginations as a way to keep the fires of hope burning inside that we could all, one day, be this ourselves?

We mean couples who actually like each other. No, no, no, I don’t mean you love each-other, of course you do. We are referring to the ones who share the same group of friends, who have combined their groups of friends into a supergroup, the ones who are best friends, who have more fun together than apart and don’t feel the need to adhere strictly to tradition- they just wanna hang out together forever. They don’t refer to each other as “the old ball and chain” or think of the wedding as a “death”. Possibly they aren’t even planning an actual wedding, maybe they will just go to the courthouse or elope to Vegas to be married by an Elvis impersonator.

Are you one of those couples?

Gross. Just kidding! We think you are wonderful, which is why we wanted to draw your attention to a trend we have seen increasing in the last few years. JOINT BACHELOR/BACHELORETTE BASHES. Let us give you an idea of how a bachelor or bachelorette weekend in Austin, Texas could go down.

-HERE WE GO-

Everyone in the bridal party flies into Texas via Austin Bergstrom International Airport

First step, LODGING! Rent a one-of-a-kind accommodation like below so everyone can have room for a weekend to remember-

Insta-Worthy 6 Bedroom Home Rainey Street

Casa Cartel- Austin Villa with Pool

12 Incredible Airbnbs in Austin, Texas

Or, rent separate residences to have some solo friend time and get together later! Search on Airbnb or check out one of Austin’s hotels like The Line, Hotel Van Zandt, or South Congress Hotel.

The LINE Austin

Hotel Van Zandt

South Congress Hotel

Rainey Street is a perfect choice for your first night out, the two parties can separate and come back together at the end of the night. Having a little friendly competition over checking off items on a scavenger hunt that you can compare results to and declare a winner is a fun way to say, “I’m so happy to see you, you lost and I won- in your face.” Everyone knows this is romantic and helps to set expectations for who is dominant in the future marriage.

The next day, attend a Disco Cruise with Premier Party on Lake Travis! Tickets are purchased individually for each person in the group and the price includes a photographer, experienced captains to drive the boat, a DJ, lily pads to swim on, water to drink, and coolers with ice. Your group only has to bring itself. Other bachelor/bachelorette parties join in as well, so it becomes one big blended party. Everyone can swim, dance, and celebrate together. There is no easier way to plan such a huge activity for a large group!

Premier Party Cruises- BOOK HERE

We LOVED how the dudes surprised the girls by dressing up as the bride to arrive on the boat. GENIUS. The night before, the girls surprised the bachelor party by dressing as the groom.

Going out the second night as one big group is the move, meet up with everyone from the Disco Cruise and take over the city of Austin- no one can stop you! Except the police, please drink responsibly and be careful.

The bottom line is, this is your time, and you can plan an epic celebration in any way you want. Traditions can be lovely, but they can always be more of a loose coat rather than a straitjacket. When the time comes to plan an Austin, Texas bachelor or bachelorette party we just want you to feel empowered to make a celebration that feels right for you and your partner, whatever that entails. Our calculations lead us to believe this will result in having the time of your life, therefore putting more joy into the world. You deserve it and frankly, we love to see it.

It’s kind of why we’re here.

Having a little friendly competition over checking off items on a scavenger hunt that you can compare results to and declare a winner is a fun way to say, \u201cI\u2019m so happy to see you, you lost and I won- in your face.\u201d Everyone knows this is romantic and helps to set expectations for who is dominant in the future marriage.<\/p>

The next day, attend a Disco Cruise with Premier Party on Lake Travis! Tickets are purchased individually for each person in the group and the price includes a photographer, experienced captains to drive the boat, a DJ, lily pads to swim on, water to drink, and coolers with ice. Your group only has to bring itself. Other bachelor\/bachelorette parties join in as well, so it becomes one big blended party. Everyone can swim, dance, and celebrate together. There is no easier way to plan such a huge activity for a large group!<\/p>

Premier Party Cruises- BOOK HERE<\/a><\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"52d5e57f","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":1782,"url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-joint-bachelor-parties-image-5.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"e39efe","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":"1572","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-joint-bachelor-parties-image-4-1.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"724867d0","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

We LOVED how the dudes surprised the girls by dressing up as the bride to arrive on the boat. GENIUS. The night before, the girls surprised the bachelor party by dressing as the groom.<\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"4aafc4c3","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":1783,"url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-joint-bachelor-parties-image-3.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"47bede44","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

Going out the second night as one big group is the move, meet up with everyone from the Disco Cruise and take over the city of Austin- no one can stop you! Except the police, please drink responsibly and be careful.<\/p>

The bottom line is, this is your time, and you can plan an epic celebration in any way you want. Traditions can be lovely, but they can always be more of a loose coat rather than a straitjacket. When the time comes to plan an Austin, Texas bachelor or bachelorette party we just want you to feel empowered to make a celebration that feels right for you and your partner, whatever that entails. Our calculations lead us to believe this will result in having the time of your life, therefore putting more joy into the world. You deserve it and frankly, we love to see it.<\/p>

It\u2019s kind of why we\u2019re here.<\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"76a6954","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":"1566","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-joint-bachelor-parties-image-2.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":false}]

item.title: Disco Cruise Fashion- Part 1
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
Disco Cruise Fashion- Part 1

Need Style Inspiration for Your Bach Boat Party? Check Out Some of Our Favorite Looks!

Ok!
So, you’ve done the impossible and not only found your soulmate - you’ve healed your inner wounds, learned how to navigate conflict, opened your heart to love - resulting in the acquisition of a partner you get to share love and life with!

OR, you’ve successfully tricked another human into proposing marriage to you. Either way, congratulations, the outcome is an engagement! It's such an exciting time. You’ve picked Austin, Texas as your bachelor or bachelorette weekend destination (great choice), and to top it off, you’ve made the smartest decision of your whole life up to this point by booking going to...

Premier Party Cruises Check Pricing and Availability 

f...illing out the quote page, reserving tickets for your group, paying your deposit, and now you have the Premier Party Disco Cruise to look forward to so your favorite crew can revel in your happiness together on a party barge on Lake Travis. This means your posse just gets to show up at Anderson Mill Marina, bring your alcohol of choice plus something to snack on, and party down while we take care of EVERYTHING else. (By everything we mean water, ice, coolers, captains, DJs, photographers, lily pads)

Honestly, we’re impressed and we want you to know that.

Now, with that out of the way, it’s time for the fun part. What. Will. You. Wear.

Fashion.

The dictionary defines “fashion” as a “popular trend, especially in styles of dress and ornament or manners of behavior”. This is true in a dry, factual way but this description resonates more for us…

”Fashion is a state of mind. A spirit, an extension of one’s self. Fashion talks, it can be an understated whisper, a high-energy scream or an all knowing wink and a smile. Most of all fashion is about being comfortable with yourself, translating self-esteem into a personal style.” CYNTHIA DURCANIN

This is poetic, no? We couldn’t have said it better ourselves, and you may wonder why we care so much about this topic, being that we only run an incredibly popular party barge company with stellar reviews and we aren’t experts in this arena. Or are we?

As our business has evolved over the years, one of the things we've grown to look forward to now is the humor, unique and individual style, and creative spirit of each group we encounter as we greet our parties boarding the boat. We notice that the more people let loose, get silly, dress up, and coordinating on themes multiplies the fun exponentially. To help jump start your exploration into finding a fashion theme that excites and perfectly fits you and your crew- we want to share a few of our favorite ideas from last year.

Disco Cowgirl/Cowboy/Cowperson.

Our most popular and all-time favorite, melding together DISCO sparkle with cowgirl flare. Think fringe, loads of sparkles and western accents. How can you go wrong?! We predict this continuing to be a huge trend for 2023 and we aren’t mad about it.

Nautical

We are at sea! This is obvious, it’s classic, it’s timeless, and it's wonderful. Captain or sailor hats, anchors, solid colors like red, blue, white and black combined with stripes.

70’s Disco.

SO much yes for this one. Retro details, lots of sparkle, colorful sunglasses, wild accessories!

Wigging out.

The crazier, the better. Strong correlation between having a more fun personality at a party and wearing a wig.

Hawaiian Shirts

Love the trend of getting these personalized with the groom or brides' face. Bonus points if it’s a mugshot or a funny childhood photo being used.

Need more inspiration? We got more inspiration. 

The biggest thing we want you to remember is to give yourself permission to get silly, get weird, and have FUN. We wanna see you forget about everything for the four hours we have you on our party barge and play with your friends. 

For more theme inspiration- we recommend checking out a few accounts

Bach Babes Party Decorating Service

TheBachParty-Bachelorette Party App

Stag & Hen- Bachelorette Party Shop

The biggest thing we want you to remember is to give yourself permission to get silly, get weird, and have FUN. We wanna see you forget about everything for the four hours we have you on our party barge and play with your friends. 

For more theme inspiration- we recommend checking out a few accounts

Bach Babes Party Decorating Service

TheBachParty-Bachelorette Party App

Stag & Hen- Bachelorette Party Shop

item.title: The Top Do’s and Don’t For Success on the ATX Disco Cruise with Premier Party Cruises
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
The Top Do’s and Don’t For Success on the ATX Disco Cruise with Premier Party Cruises

Planning Tips for Bachelor and Bachelorette Boat Parties!

If there is one thing we excel at here on the party boats with Premier Party Cruises, it’s creating the most PARTY environment on Lake Travis so that you can bliss out with your besties for four hours and forget all the mundane tasks and arbitrary societal rules you’ve been saddled with in your daily life. Planning a wedding and being an adult is difficult enough!

But, I mean, we have to have a few rules. We have an incredible track record with keeping our precious party goers safe, as well as happy, and we intend to continue! Captain Brian has a very straightforward version that have become a company motto…

“Don’t be a dick and don’t die.” 

Very easy. That’s really all you need for survival, but here a few more suggestions so you can have the best possible experience out here with us in Austin, Texas -  one of the top bachelorette and bachelor party destinations in the United States. We don't want you to just survive, we want you to THRIVE.

DO 
-Wear outrageous, hilarious, cool, funny, sexy, wild outfits and costumes! A few memorable things we’ve seen include a neon green Borat style thong (that one was hard to unsee), giant curly disco wigs, full glitter fringe jackets, matching sailor hats complete with haircuts, jorts/mullet/bolo combos, and of course more glitter, matching fanny packs, tattoos, shirts, visors, swimsuits, and bags than you can possibly imagine. It immediately sets the tone for fun, this is the perfect environment for it; reach for the stars and show us something insane we haven’t seen yet - we dare you!.

-Drink water in between every drink of alcohol. Just trust us. Dehydration is so 2002. You can thank us later! Consider bringing along something to replace electrolytes like these packets from Waterboy! Waterboy Electrolyte Packets
We provide ice and water for you with our Disco Cruises tickets, which you can begin booking here by clicking the build a quote button to see pricing and availability...

Premier Party Cruises- Begin Building a Quote!

-Make friends with the other bachelor and bachelorette parties on the boat! You and your new besties can meet each other out in Austin later on and form a SUPERGROUP to go out dancing or hanging together for parties at your Airbnbs. There is no better way to organically create a big gathering of new, fun friends that come from all over the country and are celebrating the same thing you are!

-Bring food. And eat early on! A sandwich tray from Thundercloud subs, a box of pizza, a bbq box from Rudy’s will save your life. I wish this was dramatic but it's really pretty accurate.

Thundercloud Subs

Rudy's BBQ

DON’T

-Drink liquor. Don’t take shots. Just don’t do it. You are allowed. There are no rules against it. But you are also allowed to bring a pet pig on an airplane, so long as it’s a therapy animal; but should you? Probably not, because that sounds really difficult for everyone around you. Partying is an art form, and the people who truly excel in this arena look at these four hours as a marathon, not a sprint. Hard seltzers, beers, and lighter drinks work great, and just remember that you still have that night to look forward to!

-Be creepy. Not everyone wants you to touch them, ok? Making people uncomfortable is a big no no on the boat, and with how great our clients are it rarely happens, so let’s keep that going.

-Mess with Texas. You will face the wrath of native Texans and decent humans everywhere. We don’t like that, y’all. The sheriffs who patrol the lake don’t look kindly on it either so put it in the trash can, no one litters anymore.

-Don’t actually die. Really big rule for us, it harshes the vibe a lot and we would prefer you just have a great time and then leave to have a fantastic night out in Austin when we get back to shore.

We hope this little guide helps you with planning accordingly for your bachelorette or bachelor party cruise! Follow our rules, we have them in place to keep you safe and we are always watching- but it’s up to you to make good decisions like the big grown up you are.

We trust you, sweetie, you got this.

item.title: Must-Haves for the Perfect Austin Bachelorette Weekend
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
Must-Haves for the Perfect Austin Bachelorette Weekend

Here's How You Do It RIGHT! From fun things to fashion to getting around and everything inbetween, we've got you all set up for success!

So, it’s really happening, isn’t it?
Chances are, if you are googling “Bachelorette or Bachelor Party Trip in Austin, Texas”- you’ve got a pretty big task at hand. One minute it’s just you and your besties eating two day old pizza off the counter after staying up too late studying for exams or partying the night before and before you know it… you or someone you know is the first to get engaged. Maybe you’ve never planned a party like this for someone before and don’t know where to start, or maybe it’s the tenth and you already know the ropes- either way, it’s a domino effect after that first one and they aren’t going to stop quickly. Congratulations! Weddings are a blast, love is lovely and the bachelor/bachelorette parties? Possibly more exciting than the wedding itself to be honest.

The bad news is that planning a trip for multiple people can be…overwhelming. Additionally, Austin, Texas has become one of the nation’s top bachelor/bachelorette party locations for a reason. With a lethal combination of the best food, music, and a culture that’s unique to this town and this town only? It’s not difficult to see why we have brides and grooms to-be FLOCKING here. And lucky for you, we don’t mind sharing all this awesomeness with new friends.

BUT THERE ARE SO MANY CHOICES. It’s a choose your own adventure map from hell if you are dropped in the middle of it. How to please everyone? What to do first?

How about this…we give you one itinerary that we believe in with our whole hearts, made by locals.

THURSDAY

Arriving on a Thursday evening is the move. Everyone has time to tie up loose ends in the morning, have a travel day, and get settled before the action really begins.

Fly into Austin Bergstrom International Airport and grab your rideshares to your hotel. In this scenario you are staying at The Kimpton Hotel Van Zandt on Rainey Street. Why? It’s beautiful, has a pool and is conveniently located within stumbling distance of the action, a decision that will save you money in rideshares.

Kimpton Hotel Van Zandt, an IHG Hotel - ReservationDesk.com

If you are a bachelorette party the first best decision you have made is that you decided to hire Bach Babes beforehand, and they have decked out your hotel room in the theme you chose, DISCO COWGIRL. The bride walks in and is blown away, it’s an instant mood.

Austin Form — Bach Babes

Bach Babes (@bach_babes) • Instagram photos and videos

This first night is allllll about getting ready. Instead of staying up late drinking, the focus is on everyone arriving, hydrating, and getting settled.

For early arrivers spend the afternoon walking down Congress, perusing shops like Allen’s Boots, where you can purchase one of a kind Texan footwear to sport all weekend, then dinner at Vietnamese/French fusion restaurant Elizabeth Street Cafe.  Everything on the menu is amazing, the drinks are fantastic, and you can’t go wrong here. We know you want to party, but you’ve made the mistake of blowing out the first night and struggling the rest of the trip before and you’ve learned from it. This is a marathon, not a sprint.

Cowboy Boots and Western Wear | Shop Now at Allens Boots

Elizabeth Street Café / Austin (elizabethstreetcafe.com)

FRIDAY

Good Morning!

Everyone is fresh and feeling wonderful and ready to GO.

The squad is excited because today….you are going on a PARTY BOAT ON LAKE TRAVIS WITH PREMIER PARTY CRUISES. No one else realized that all you had to do was go to their website, click the blue button to build a quote, collect payments from each person and BOOM- you had reserved space to the best party in Austin. The best part about all of this is that it was priced per ticket and included in this cost is a DJ, a professional photographer, captains who drive the boat, coolers and ice, water, cups, lily pads to lay on in the water, and each bachelorette party has their own mimosa setup inside a cooler. You have a lot of street cred for being responsible for this event and, yeah, that feels good. You don’t have to tell them. We won’t ruin it for you.
Premier Party Cruises Austin Party Boat Rentals on Lake Travis - Leander

The party starts at 12 and goes until 4, so for breakfast everyone walks to get breakfast tacos at Taco Deli, only fifteen minutes away. Walking is the best way to see a city!  DO NOT SKIP THE DONA SAUCE if you like spicy things.
Tacodeli

Back at the hotel, everyone dresses in their craziest/hottest/funniest outfits to fit the theme you decided on and your ride from Austin Party Bus Company comes to get you. You had a Thundercloud sub sandwich tray delivered to the room before you left and all you have to bring is that, your own booze, and sunscreen. Easy.

The Premier Party Disco Cruise has several other bachelor and bachelorette parties on board, the DJ absolutely crushes it, and you make new friends, dance and swim more than you have for years. At 4, the party bus comes to pick you up from the lake and take you back to the hotel.

Austin Party Bus - We Rent Buses 7 Days A Week in Central Texas

Showers, getting ready, and dinner at Kemuri Tatsuya. The menu there contains fun and wild surprises in shareable dishes and the drinks come in kitschy containers like tiki cats! Meet up with the other groups from the disco cruise on the East Side at White Horse for live music and two stepping.

Kemuri Tatsu-ya - Hours, Directions, and Reservations (kemuri-tatsuya.com)
The White Horse - East Austin Honky Tonk (thewhitehorseaustin.com)
SATURDAY

Get up and don’t worry about getting too ready or feeling hungover, you are grabbing smoothie bowls and vegan breakfast items at Austin staple, Juiceland, and heading to Barton Springs. You can’t bring alcohol, cigarettes, or food inside- but this historic Austin attraction is the heart of our city and shouldn’t be missed. It’s perfect for a recovery morning. Jump into the cold spring water together, nap on blankets, people watch, and enjoy the skyline.
The BEST Fresh Smoothies & Juice in Texas | JuiceLand

Barton Springs Pool | AustinTexas.gov

Lunch at Terry Black’s Barbeque, right next to Barton Springs. You really can’t leave Austin without tacos and barbecue, it’s just not allowed. Casual and messy food after swimming and go hand in hand

Austin | Terry Black's BBQ (terryblacksbbq.com)

Head back to the hotel and take your time getting all dressed up, you have late dinner reservations at French restaurant Justine’s- one of Austin’s most beloved restaurants frequented by locals and travelers alike

Justine's Brasserie (justines1937.com)

Escargot, Steak Frites, fantastic drinks- it’s the best for a fancy night out.

Make an appointment beforehand at Lumiere Tintype, located in the back garden of the restaurant. These beautiful and unique old fashioned portraits are the kind of intensely special thing your grandkids will keep around.
Lumiere Tintype Photography

After dinner?

Burn it down at Coconut Club and Neon Grotto and remember to invite all the friends you’ve made at the Disco Cruise! This club has different levels, themes, DJs, a rooftop spot and hot weirdos running through it- it’s perfect.

Coconut Club (@coconutclub.austin) • Instagram photos and videos

SUNDAY

Well. That went by fast. It’s time to get ready to leave- you are exhausted and sore from all the dancing and laughing you’ve put your body through.

Banger’s Brunch is your last hoorah. Get there right when it opens, get the giant Manmosas, enjoy live music and incredible food, cheers your groom or bride and say goodbye to your group- it’s been a legendary trip.

Banger's Sausage House & Beer Garden - Nationwide Shipping (bangersaustin.com)
Fly out of Austin Bergstrom International Airport and fall asleep with your mouth open before the plane even takes off

When it comes to options for this city, we know they are endless. That’s why this is only the first of several itineraries we are putting out. At Premier we take fun and friendship seriously, and we want you to have a BLAST with your crew

Life is short

Follow the call of the Disco Ball, live it up, hug your friends, celebrate love, and eat tacos

43 Best Restaurants In Austin (Updated 2021) | A Taste of Koko

barton-springs-pool | That’s What She Had (thatswhatshehad.com)

Where to drink in Austin right now: 15 sexiest bars in the city - CultureMap Austin

Texas Tourism on Instagram: “Everything’s bigger in Texas – including our mimosas! Ring in the new year Texas-style by adding @bangersaustin to your #2018 bucket list.…” (pinterest.com)

[{"id":"3280cb63","elType":"container","settings":{"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"100","right":"25","bottom":"100","left":"25","isLinked":false},"flex_direction":"column","flex_align_items":"stretch","flex_gap":{"size":40,"unit":"px","column":"40","row":"40","isLinked":true},"flex_gap_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":20,"sizes":[],"column":"20","row":"20","isLinked":true},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"80","right":"25","bottom":"80","left":"25","isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"60","right":"25","bottom":"60","left":"25","isLinked":false},"background_background":"classic"},"elements":[{"id":"12720027","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Must-Haves for the Perfect Austin Bachelorette Weekend\n","header_size":"h1","align_mobile":"center","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=secondary","title_color":"globals\/colors?id=788a7d2"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"5f33cc42","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"Here's How You Do It RIGHT! From fun things to fashion to getting around and everything inbetween, we've got you all set up for success!\n","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"44cd9141","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"_padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":"1585","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-must-haves-for-the-perfect-bachelorette-weekend-image-1.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"162d0b03","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

So, it\u2019s really happening, isn\u2019t it?
Chances are, if you are googling \u201cBachelorette or Bachelor Party Trip in Austin, Texas\u201d- you\u2019ve got a pretty big task at hand. One minute it\u2019s just you and your besties eating two day old pizza off the counter after staying up too late studying for exams or partying the night before and before you know it\u2026 you or someone you know is the first to get engaged. Maybe you\u2019ve never planned a party like this for someone before and don\u2019t know where to start, or maybe it\u2019s the tenth and you already know the ropes- either way, it\u2019s a domino effect after that first one and they aren\u2019t going to stop quickly. Congratulations! Weddings are a blast, love is lovely and the bachelor\/bachelorette parties? Possibly more exciting than the wedding itself to be honest.<\/p>

The bad news is that planning a trip for multiple people can be\u2026overwhelming.\u00a0Additionally, Austin, Texas has become one of the nation\u2019s top bachelor\/bachelorette party locations for a reason.<\/u><\/a>\u00a0With a lethal combination of the best food, music, and a culture that\u2019s unique to this town and this town only? It\u2019s not difficult to see why we have brides and grooms to-be FLOCKING here. And lucky for you, we don\u2019t mind sharing all this awesomeness with new friends.<\/p>

BUT THERE ARE SO MANY CHOICES. It\u2019s a choose your own adventure map from hell if you are dropped in the middle of it. How to please everyone? What to do first?<\/p>

How about this\u2026we give you one itinerary that we believe in with our whole hearts, made by locals.<\/p>

THURSDAY<\/u><\/p>

Arriving on a Thursday evening is the move. Everyone has time to tie up loose ends in the morning, have a travel day, and get settled before the action really begins.<\/p>

Fly into Austin Bergstrom International Airport and grab your rideshares to your hotel. In this scenario you are staying at The Kimpton Hotel Van Zandt on Rainey Street. Why? It\u2019s beautiful, has a pool and is conveniently located within stumbling distance of the action, a decision that will save you money in rideshares.<\/p>

Kimpton Hotel Van Zandt, an IHG Hotel - ReservationDesk.com<\/u><\/a><\/p>

If you are a bachelorette party the first best decision you have made is that you decided to hire Bach Babes beforehand, and they have decked out your hotel room in the theme you chose, DISCO COWGIRL. The bride walks in and is blown away, it\u2019s an instant mood.<\/p>

Austin Form \u2014 Bach Babes<\/u><\/a><\/p>

Bach Babes (@bach_babes) \u2022 Instagram photos and videos<\/u><\/a><\/p>

This first night is allllll about getting ready. Instead of staying up late drinking, the focus is on everyone arriving, hydrating, and getting settled.<\/p>

For early arrivers spend the afternoon walking down Congress, perusing shops like Allen\u2019s Boots, where you can purchase one of a kind Texan footwear to sport all weekend, then dinner at Vietnamese\/French fusion restaurant Elizabeth Street Cafe. \u00a0Everything on the menu is amazing, the drinks are fantastic, and you can\u2019t go wrong here. We know you want to party, but you\u2019ve made the mistake of blowing out the first night and struggling the rest of the trip before and you\u2019ve learned from it. This is a marathon, not a sprint.<\/p>

Cowboy Boots and Western Wear | Shop Now at Allens Boots<\/u><\/a><\/p>

Elizabeth Street Caf\u00e9 \/ Austin (elizabethstreetcafe.com)<\/u><\/a><\/p>

FRIDAY<\/u><\/p>

Good Morning!<\/p>

Everyone is fresh and feeling wonderful and ready to GO.<\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"57dd6f6","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":"1586","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-must-haves-for-the-perfect-bachelorette-weekend-image-2.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"79ae76d2","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

The squad is excited because today\u2026.you are going on a PARTY BOAT ON LAKE TRAVIS WITH PREMIER PARTY CRUISES<\/u><\/a>. No one else realized that all you had to do was go to their website, click the blue button to build a quote, collect payments from each person and BOOM- you had reserved space to the best party in Austin. The best part about all of this is that it was priced per ticket and included in this cost is a DJ, a professional photographer, captains who drive the boat, coolers and ice, water, cups, lily pads to lay on in the water, and each bachelorette party has their own mimosa setup inside a cooler. You have a lot of street cred for being responsible for this event and, yeah, that feels good. You don\u2019t have to tell them. We won\u2019t ruin it for you.
Premier Party Cruises Austin Party Boat Rentals on Lake Travis - Leander<\/u><\/a><\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"4409b6d8","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"id":"1587","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-must-haves-for-the-perfect-bachelorette-weekend-image-5.jpg"},"image_size":"full"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"65b89309","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":"1583","url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-must-haves-for-the-perfect-bachelorette-weekend-image-3.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"121ec871","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

The party starts at 12 and goes until 4, so for breakfast everyone walks to get breakfast tacos at Taco Deli, only fifteen minutes away. Walking is the best way to see a city! \u00a0DO NOT SKIP THE DONA SAUCE if you like spicy things.
Tacodeli<\/u><\/a><\/p>

Back at the hotel, everyone dresses in their craziest\/hottest\/funniest outfits to fit the theme you decided on and your ride from Austin Party Bus Company comes to get you. You had a Thundercloud sub sandwich tray delivered to the room before you left and all you have to bring is that, your own booze, and sunscreen. Easy.<\/p>

The Premier Party Disco Cruise has several other bachelor and bachelorette parties on board, the DJ absolutely crushes it, and you make new friends, dance and swim more than you have for years. At 4, the party bus comes to pick you up from the lake and take you back to the hotel.<\/p>

SATURDAY<\/u><\/p>","align":"left","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a5fb3f3","text_color":"globals\/colors?id=text"},"align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"173cff6d","elType":"widget","settings":{"_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"20","left":"0","isLinked":false},"image":{"id":1823,"url":"https:\/\/premierpartycruises.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/austin-texas-blog-must-haves-for-the-perfect-bachelorette-weekend-image-6.jpg"},"image_size":"full","width":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"5bf8f2c1","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: The Recipe for the CHILLEST ATX Bach Party
item.dc:creator: JosePilapil
item.content:encoded:
The Recipe for the CHILLEST ATX Bach Party

Planning a Laid Back Austin, Texas Bachelor/ette Party Austin, Texas. Music Capital. BBQ Central. Bachelor and Bachelorette mecca During the week? A creative, smoothly bustling city filled with an interesting mix of young professionals, students, artists, activists, hippies, conservatives, etc. etc. On the weekends? Lines out of doors, waitlists for restaurants, strangers coughing on you as you wait for your drink at the bar. The horror of watching intoxicated women stagger around dangerously in high heels down 6th street as you struggle to find a rideshare home on busy nights. OVERSTIMULATION Is this how you feel about planning and attending a bachelor/bachelorette party here? If it is, that’s ok, we aren’t judging you. We believe it’s a misconception that all groups want to do the exact same thing when it comes to celebrating. If you have a large group and you’ve traveled all this way, maybe you kind of want to chill together? Maybe you’ve decided on a joint bachelor/bachelorette shindig Honoring the spirit of those who want to chill for a MFing second, we made a new itinerary. This one’s for you!

Friday

Fly in and arrive at Austin Bergstrom International Airport! We recommend coming in as early as possible so you don\'t feel rushed while settling in. Instead of booking a hotel room for this trip, you’ve decided to book an INCREDIBLE HOUSE WITH A POOL! Here are three great options we’ve found- among many! Check out OneChelofanAdventure’s link below for a few more excellent options. The Graeber- 6th Street + Pool- Downtown Austin Casa Villa- Pool, 11 Beds, 5 Bedrooms in Bouldin La Casita Rosa- Pink Paradise in Dripping Springs with Heated Pool The Graeber House Hiring Bach Babes to decorate your space for you beforehand is the MOVE, they are super experienced and creative with tons of different themes possible. Taking the pressure off yourself and group so you can settle in and get ready for the evening in peace just makes sense. Another option through this company is ordering a Bach Babes box and decorating yourself. Either way, when your bride or groom arrives and walks in, your space is READY for the night and instantly puts everyone in a party mood. Bach Babes Decorating Having a fancy charcuterie board delivered from BlueBonnet Collective is also a boss move, because everyone has something to snack on right away- plus, duh, it’s a thing of beauty! BlueBonnet Collective Throw on your swimsuits, get some barbeque from La Barbecue Favored over to you and actually enjoy having a conversation with your friends instead of running around trying to arrange things! La Barbecue If you are drinking, we LOVE Watertight Cocktails and Momo’s Michelada mix to make micheladas. Two amazing local businesses to support, plus they are PERFECT for a party night at the pool. Watertight Cocktails Momo\'s Michelada Mix

Saturday

Today, you have a big activity… a party cruise with Premier Party Cruises on Lake Travis!! I mean, we aren’t biased or anything, it\'s just something we suggest you shouldn’t miss. No personal stake in this, we’ve just heard good things from…everyone who has ever been on a cruise with Premier. Premier Party Cruises\' ATX Disco Cruises are the BEST parties on Lake Travis, hands down. Also, because you purchase admission by the ticket and it includes everything you need besides booze it ends up being the easiest and most cost effective decision you could make. DJ, photographer, captains, coolers, water, ice, and lily pad floats all provided for you! Premier Party Cruises\' ATX Disco Cruises are the BEST parties on Lake Travis, hands down. Also, because you purchase admission by the ticket and it includes everything you need besides booze it ends up being the easiest and most cost effective decision you could make. DJ, photographer, captains, coolers, water, ice, and lily pad floats all provided for you!

However, we also have private boats available- and you know what? Having your own party is pretty sweet too. The ability to add on the extras provided for the Disco Cruise to private cruises allows us to create the perfect party experience for your crew. CLICK HERE TO START YOUR OWN QUOTE AND RESERVE TICKETS Premier Party Cruises - Start Quote

Photo taken by Premier Cruise Photographer Sam @capitalcityshots Hire Fetii for your ride and use our discount code to allow everyone to come and go safely. (NEED TO GET LINK AND EXACT CODE AND DISCOUNT FROM JUSTIN TO INSERT HERE) Make sure to pick up a sandwich tray from beloved local sandwich shop Thundercloud subs. The California club is a favorite! Thundercloud Subs

From 11- 3:30 PM you dance, swim, laugh, blow bubbles and roll around on a lily pad in the lake

Upon arrival back home, enjoy a hibachi dinner made by your own private chef! No need to prep or clean up after- everyone can completely unwind and hang out in the pool afterwards.

TeppanTX- At Home Hibachi

Sunday

Get up and roll out. Get Torchy’s breakfast tacos before you head to the airport. This was the chillest, most fun bachelor/bachelorette party you’ve ever been to. This trip was all about spending quality time with your crew and the groom and/or bride to be, having a blast, and not about rushing all over town. Mission Completed. Best Places to Stay for a Bachelor/Bachelorette Party in Austin- Onechelofanadventure

Planning a Laid Back Austin, Texas Bachelor\\/ette Party<\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\",\"_margin\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"0\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"_padding\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"0\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"9558009\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"20\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-7.jpg\",\"id\":2317,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 7\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"f69cbe5\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Austin, Texas.<\\/p>

Music Capital. BBQ Central. Bachelor and Bachelorette mecca<\\/p>

During the week? A creative, smoothly bustling city filled with an interesting mix of young professionals, students, artists, activists, hippies, conservatives, etc. etc.<\\/p>

On the weekends? Lines out of doors, waitlists for restaurants, strangers coughing on you as you wait for your drink at the bar. The horror of watching intoxicated women stagger around dangerously in high heels down 6th street as you struggle to find a rideshare home on busy nights.<\\/p>

OVERSTIMULATION<\\/p>

Is this how you feel about planning and attending a bachelor\\/bachelorette party here? If it is, that\\u2019s ok, we aren\\u2019t judging you. We believe it\\u2019s a misconception that all groups want to do the exact same thing when it comes to celebrating. If you have a large group and you\\u2019ve traveled all this way, maybe you kind of want to chill together? Maybe you\\u2019ve decided on a joint bachelor\\/bachelorette shindig<\\/p>

Honoring the spirit of those who want to chill for a MFing second, we made a new itinerary. This one\\u2019s for you!<\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"ca5daa4\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"title\":\"Friday \\n\\n\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=1bad922\",\"title_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=788a7d2\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"heading\"},{\"id\":\"a88bf62\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Fly in and arrive at Austin Bergstrom International Airport! We recommend coming in as early as possible so you don\'t feel rushed while settling in.<\\/p>

Instead of booking a hotel room for this trip, you\\u2019ve decided to book an INCREDIBLE HOUSE WITH A POOL! Here are three great options we\\u2019ve found- among many! Check out OneChelofanAdventure\\u2019s link below for a few more excellent options.<\\/p>

The Graeber- 6th Street + Pool- Downtown Austin<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>

Casa Villa- Pool, 11 Beds, 5 Bedrooms in Bouldin<\\/a><\\/u><\\/strong><\\/p>

La Casita Rosa- Pink Paradise in Dripping Springs with Heated Pool<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>


The Graeber House<\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"4c6c305\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"20\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-4.jpg\",\"id\":2318,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 4\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"5857d8e\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Hiring Bach Babes to decorate your space for you beforehand is the MOVE, they are super experienced and creative with tons of different themes possible. Taking the pressure off yourself and group so you can settle in and get ready for the evening in peace just makes sense. Another option through this company is ordering a Bach Babes box and decorating yourself. Either way, when your bride or groom arrives and walks in, your space is READY for the night and instantly puts everyone in a party mood.<\\/p>

Bach Babes Decorating<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"19282d5\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"20\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-6.jpg\",\"id\":2319,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 6\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"70ae93a\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Having a fancy charcuterie board delivered from BlueBonnet Collective is also a boss move, because everyone has something to snack on right away- plus, duh, it\\u2019s a thing of beauty!\\u00a0<\\/p>

BlueBonnet Collective<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"6d8a997\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"20\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-5.jpg\",\"id\":2320,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 5\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"f3a57b2\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Throw on your swimsuits, get some barbeque from La Barbecue Favored over to you and actually enjoy having a conversation with your friends instead of running around trying to arrange things!

La Barbecue<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"b720ba9\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"0\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-3.jpg\",\"id\":2321,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 3\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"7c85f1f\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

If you are drinking, we LOVE Watertight Cocktails and Momo\\u2019s Michelada mix to make micheladas. Two amazing local businesses to support, plus they are PERFECT for a party night at the pool.
Watertight Cocktails<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>

Momo\'s Michelada Mix<\\/a><\\/strong><\\/u><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"a4f0b49\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"title\":\"Saturday \",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=1bad922\",\"title_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=788a7d2\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"heading\"},{\"id\":\"8435f79\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Today, you have a big activity\\u2026 a party cruise with\\u00a0Premier Party Cruises on Lake Travis<\\/u>!!<\\/a>\\u00a0I mean, we aren\\u2019t biased or anything, it\'s just something we suggest you shouldn\\u2019t miss. No personal stake in this, we\\u2019ve just heard good things from\\u2026everyone who has ever been on a cruise with Premier.
Premier Party Cruises\' ATX Disco Cruises are the BEST parties on Lake Travis, hands down. Also, because you purchase admission by the ticket and it includes everything you need besides booze it ends up being the easiest and most cost effective decision you could make. DJ, photographer, captains, coolers, water, ice, and lily pad floats all provided for you!
Premier Party Cruises\' ATX Disco Cruises are the BEST parties on Lake Travis, hands down<\\/u><\\/a>. Also, because you purchase admission by the ticket and it includes everything you need besides booze it ends up being the easiest and most cost effective decision you could make. DJ, photographer, captains, coolers, water, ice, and lily pad floats all provided for you!<\\/p>

However, we also have private boats available- and you know what? Having your own party is pretty sweet too. The ability to add on the extras provided for the Disco Cruise to private cruises allows us to create the perfect party experience for your crew.
CLICK HERE TO START YOUR OWN QUOTE AND RESERVE TICKETS
Premier Party Cruises - Start Quote<\\/u><\\/strong><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"cfcac82\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"0\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-1.jpg\",\"id\":2322,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 1\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"6445ff5\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Photo taken by Premier Cruise Photographer Sam @capitalcityshots<\\/em><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"a13a9e8\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Hire Fetii for your ride and use our discount code to allow everyone to come and go safely. (NEED TO GET LINK AND EXACT CODE AND DISCOUNT FROM JUSTIN TO INSERT HERE)
Make sure to pick up a sandwich tray from beloved local sandwich shop Thundercloud subs. The California club is a favorite!
Thundercloud Subs<\\/a><\\/u><\\/strong><\\/p>

From 11- 3:30 PM you dance, swim, laugh, blow bubbles and roll around on a lily pad in the lake<\\/p>

Upon arrival back home, enjoy a hibachi dinner made by your own private chef! No need to prep or clean up after- everyone can completely unwind and hang out in the pool afterwards.<\\/p>

TeppanTX- At Home Hibachi<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"},{\"id\":\"5c81c03\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"_padding_tablet\":{\"unit\":\"px\",\"top\":\"0\",\"right\":\"0\",\"bottom\":\"0\",\"left\":\"0\",\"isLinked\":false},\"image\":{\"url\":\"https:\\/\\/premierpartycruises.com\\/wp-content\\/uploads\\/2023\\/09\\/austin-texas-blogthe-recipe-for-the-chillest-atx-image-2.jpg\",\"id\":2323,\"size\":\"\",\"alt\":\"austin texas blogthe recipe for the chillest atx image 2\",\"source\":\"library\"},\"image_size\":\"full\",\"width\":{\"unit\":\"%\",\"size\":100,\"sizes\":[]}},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"image\"},{\"id\":\"8b8bb44\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"title\":\"Sunday\\n\\n\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=1bad922\",\"title_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=788a7d2\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"heading\"},{\"id\":\"d59967b\",\"elType\":\"widget\",\"settings\":{\"editor\":\"

Get up and roll out.
Get Torchy\\u2019s breakfast tacos before you head to the airport.<\\/p>

This was the chillest, most fun bachelor\\/bachelorette party you\\u2019ve ever been to. This trip was all about spending quality time with your crew and the groom and\\/or bride to be, having a blast, and not about rushing all over town.<\\/p>

Mission Completed.<\\/p>

Best Places to Stay for a Bachelor\\/Bachelorette Party in Austin- Onechelofanadventure<\\/strong><\\/u><\\/a><\\/p>\",\"align\":\"left\",\"__globals__\":{\"typography_typography\":\"globals\\/typography?id=a5fb3f3\",\"text_color\":\"globals\\/colors?id=text\"},\"align_mobile\":\"center\"},\"elements\":[],\"widgetType\":\"text-editor\"}],\"isInner\":false}]

item.title: The Ultimate Austin Bachelorette Party Alcohol Guide: What to Order, When to Order, and How Much You Actually Need
item.dc:creator: BrianHill
item.content:encoded:
The Ultimate Austin Bachelorette Party Alcohol Guide: What to Order, When to Order, and How Much You Actually Need

Austin, Texas with its vibrant nightlife and stunning Lake Travis, is a top bachelorette party destination. Planning the perfect celebration, especially managing alcohol, can be challenging. Party On Delivery and Premier Party Cruises offer the ONLY integrated alcohol delivery and party boat service in Austin, simplifying your experience.

Austin Rita cocktail setup by Party On Delivery - Austin's favorite alcohol delivery service with no minimum delivery and 100% buyback guarantee

This comprehensive guide will help you navigate alcohol ordering, timing, and quantity for your Austin bachelorette party, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable celebration whether you're downtown or on Lake Travis.

What to Order: Crafting Your Bachelorette Beverage Menu

For your Austin bachelorette party, a diverse beverage selection is key. Party On Delivery simplifies this, offering a wide range of spirits, beers, wines, and cocktail kits delivered directly to your location, be it an Airbnb or a Lake Travis marina.

Essential Categories for Your Bachelorette Bar

  1. Spirits: Include versatile options like vodka, tequila (e.g., Tito's Handmade Vodka, Espolon Tequila Blanco), rum, and gin for cocktails.
  2. Wine & Champagne: Bubbly for toasts (champagne/prosecco) and a mix of red and white wines (e.g., crisp Sauvignon Blanc, light Pinot Noir) are essential. Rosé is always a hit.
  3. Beer & Seltzers: Offer local Austin craft beers and popular seltzers (e.g., High Noon Variety Packs) for lighter, refreshing options, especially for day drinking.
  4. Mixers & Garnishes: Stock up on sodas, juices, tonic, sparkling water, and fresh limes, lemons, and oranges. Party On Delivery's cocktail kits (like the Austin Rita Party Pitcher Kit) simplify drink prep.
  5. Non-Alcoholic Options: Always provide water, sparkling water, and soft drinks. Consider fun mocktail ingredients to include everyone.
Pro Tip: Party On Delivery offers free order consultations to help you craft the perfect order based on your party size, preferences, and budget. This ensures you get exactly what you need without waste. Call (737) 371-9700 for expert guidance!

When to Order: Timing Your Alcohol Delivery for Seamless Celebrations

Timing is crucial for your Austin bachelorette party alcohol delivery. Party On Delivery offers flexible 1-hour delivery windows to ensure your beverages arrive fresh and chilled, whether for pre-party festivities, a Lake Travis boat cruise, or a relaxed evening.

Premier Party Cruises - Austin's premier Lake Travis party boat service with 14+ years of experience and 125,000+ satisfied customers

Strategic Delivery Timing

  1. Arrival Day Delivery: Schedule your first delivery for shortly after arrival in Austin for immediate refreshments.
  2. Pre-Lake Day Delivery: For Premier Party Cruises on Lake Travis, arrange delivery to the marina. Party On Delivery coordinates directly, eliminating the need to transport heavy coolers.
  3. Event-Specific Deliveries: Schedule deliveries to coincide with specific activities like dinners or pool parties to keep drinks fresh and cold.
  4. Replenishment Orders: Place multiple smaller orders throughout your weekend to prevent over-ordering. Party On Delivery offers 100% buyback on unopened bottles.

How Much You Actually Need: Calculating the Perfect Amount

Determining the right amount of alcohol for your Austin bachelorette party depends on several factors: group size, duration, activities, and drinking preferences. Here's a practical guide to help you calculate the perfect amount.

Real bachelorette party celebrating on Lake Travis with Premier Party Cruises - Austin's most trusted party boat company

General Guidelines for Alcohol Quantities

  • Cocktails: Plan for 2-3 drinks per person for a 4-hour event
  • Wine: One bottle serves approximately 4-5 glasses
  • Beer: Plan for 1-2 beers per person per hour for casual drinking
  • Champagne: One bottle serves 6-8 glasses for toasts

Lake Travis Boat Party Considerations

When planning for a Premier Party Cruises boat party on Lake Travis, consider the Texas heat and sun exposure. Lighter drinks like seltzers, beer, and wine spritzers are ideal. Premier Party Cruises, with their perfect safety record and 14+ years of experience, recommends staying well-hydrated with plenty of water alongside alcoholic beverages.

Bachelorette parties love Premier Party Cruises for the ultimate Lake Travis experience with professional captains and top-tier safety equipment

Expert Tips for Austin Bachelorette Success

Coordination Between Services

The unique partnership between Party On Delivery and Premier Party Cruises creates Austin's most seamless bachelorette party experience. This integration allows for:

  • Direct delivery to Lake Travis marinas
  • Coordinated timing for boat departures
  • Professional consultation for both alcohol and boat party planning
  • Backup options if weather affects Lake Travis activities

Austin-Specific Recommendations

Austin's unique party culture calls for specific considerations. Local favorites include Austin Rita cocktails, craft beer from local breweries, and refreshing options perfect for the Texas climate. Party On Delivery specializes in Austin party culture and can recommend the perfect selections for your group.

Professional cocktail setup by Party On Delivery - Austin's favorite alcohol delivery service with no minimum delivery requirements

Conclusion: Your Perfect Austin Bachelorette Awaits

Planning an Austin bachelorette party should be exciting, not stressful. By following this ultimate guide and partnering with Party On Delivery and Premier Party Cruises, you ensure a seamless, fun, and unforgettable celebration.

From Austin's vibrant downtown scene to Lake Travis's pristine waters, these trusted Austin businesses provide everything you need for the ultimate bachelorette party experience. Their combined expertise, reliability, and commitment to customer satisfaction make them the perfect partners for your celebration.

Ready to Plan Your Perfect Austin Bachelorette?

Party On Delivery
Phone: (737) 371-9700
Website: partyondelivery.com

Premier Party Cruises
Phone: (512) 488-5892
Website: premierpartycruises.com

Cocktail Kits vs. Individual Bottles: The Smart Bachelorette Party Alcohol Strategy

Austin, Texas is a premier destination for bachelorette parties, offering everything from vibrant nightlife to stunning natural beauty around Lake Travis. When planning the perfect celebration, the choice between cocktail kits and individual bottles can significantly impact your event's success. Party On Delivery and Premier Party Cruises help you navigate this decision for a seamless celebration.
Professional cocktail setup by Party On Delivery - Austin's favorite alcohol delivery service with convenient cocktail kits and premium spirits

The Bachelorette Party Alcohol Planning Dilemma: Kits or Bottles?

Organizing a bachelorette party involves countless details, and managing the bar is often a major challenge. Traditional approaches might involve buying a variety of individual spirits, mixers, and garnishes. However, a growing trend among savvy planners is the use of pre-portioned cocktail kits from Party On Delivery.

🥂 Cocktail Kits: The Modern Solution

Cocktail kits offer unparalleled convenience and consistency, making them ideal for group events like bachelorette parties. They typically include all necessary ingredients in the right proportions, often with easy-to-follow instructions. This eliminates extensive shopping, measuring, and mixing on-site, allowing you to focus on the fun.
Austin Rita cocktail kit by Party On Delivery - pre-measured ingredients and professional shaker for perfect bachelorette party cocktails

Why Cocktail Kits Win for Austin Bachelorette Parties

✅ Perfect Portions

No guessing on quantities - each kit serves exactly the right number of people

✅ Professional Quality

Consistent, bar-quality cocktails every time with premium ingredients

✅ Time Saving

No shopping for individual ingredients or measuring during the party

✅ Cost Effective

Often cheaper than buying individual bottles with no waste

Lake Travis Boat Party Advantages

When planning a Premier Party Cruises boat party on Lake Travis, cocktail kits become even more valuable. Space is limited on boats, and cocktail kits maximize efficiency while minimizing cleanup. Party On Delivery coordinates directly with Premier Party Cruises for seamless marina delivery.
Premier Party Cruises - Austin's premier Lake Travis party boat service, perfect for cocktail kit celebrations with 14+ years of experience

Individual Bottles: When They Make Sense

Traditional Individual Bottles Approach:

  • Maximum Flexibility: Create any cocktail combination
  • Leftover Value: Keep unused bottles for future events
  • Custom Mixing: Adjust strength and flavors to taste
  • Variety: Offer multiple cocktail options simultaneously

The Challenges of Individual Bottles

While individual bottles offer flexibility, they come with challenges for bachelorette parties:
  • Quantity Estimation: Difficult to predict exact amounts needed
  • Shopping Complexity: Multiple store trips for various ingredients
  • Setup Time: Extensive preparation and organization required
  • Consistency Issues: Drink quality varies with different mixers
  • Cleanup: More bottles and equipment to manage

Party On Delivery's Smart Solution

Party On Delivery specializes in curating party alcohol packages that simplify Austin bachelorette party planning. Their offerings range from complete cocktail kits to custom assortments of beverages, all designed to meet your celebration's unique needs.
Real bachelorette party enjoying cocktail kits on Premier Party Cruises - the perfect combination of convenience and celebration

Popular Cocktail Kit Options

  • Austin Rita Kit: Local favorite with premium tequila and fresh mixers
  • Mimosa Bar Kit: Perfect for brunch celebrations with champagne and juices
  • Margarita Party Kit: Classic choice with everything for perfect margaritas
  • Cosmopolitan Kit: Elegant option for sophisticated celebrations
  • Custom Combinations: Tailored to your group's preferences

Cost Analysis: Kits vs. Individual Bottles

💰 Financial Comparison for 10-Person Bachelorette Party

Cocktail Kit Approach:

  • 2 Austin Rita Kits (serves 10-12): $120
  • Delivery and setup included
  • No waste or leftover ingredients
  • Total: $120

Individual Bottles Approach:

  • Premium tequila bottle: $45
  • Triple sec: $25
  • Fresh lime juice: $15
  • Simple syrup: $10
  • Salt and garnishes: $15
  • Shopping time and gas: $20
  • Total: $130+ (plus time investment)

Expert Recommendations for Austin Bachelorette Success

When to Choose Cocktail Kits

  • Lake Travis boat parties with Premier Party Cruises
  • Limited preparation time before the celebration
  • Consistent drink quality is important to your group
  • Space constraints at your venue or accommodation
  • Inexperienced bartenders in your group

When Individual Bottles Work Better

  • Multi-day celebrations with varying drink preferences
  • Large groups with diverse tastes
  • Experienced mixologists in your party
  • Budget flexibility for premium individual spirits
Bachelorette parties love the convenience of cocktail kits on Premier Party Cruises - professional service meets perfect planning

The Verdict: Smart Strategy for Austin Celebrations

For most Austin bachelorette parties, especially those involving Premier Party Cruises on Lake Travis, cocktail kits from Party On Delivery offer the optimal balance of convenience, quality, and cost-effectiveness.

🏆 The Winning Combination:

Choose cocktail kits for your main celebration (boat party, main event) and individual bottles for extended festivities (pre-party, after-party). This hybrid approach maximizes both convenience and flexibility.

Conclusion: Elevate Your Austin Bachelorette Experience

The choice between cocktail kits and individual bottles doesn't have to be all-or-nothing. The smartest Austin bachelorette party strategy combines the convenience of Party On Delivery's cocktail kits for your main events with the flexibility of individual bottles for extended celebrations. When you partner with Party On Delivery and Premier Party Cruises, you get the best of both worlds: professional-quality cocktails delivered directly to your Lake Travis boat party, combined with the expertise and reliability that comes from Austin's most trusted party planning partners.
